priority_levels.definition: workflow failure / runtime pipeline broken / stale runtime causing stale M1/M7/MM
priority_levels.action_bias: 先處理，因為會阻斷 daily operation 或正式 judgment

priority_levels.definition: stale M1/M7 / missing runtime / onboarding incomplete
priority_levels.action_bias: 影響正式 judgment 品質，需排在 research 類問題前

priority_levels.definition: missing research card / missing EPS / partial coverage / stale support data
priority_levels.action_bias: 補強資料完整性與 explainability
改善維護性與後續追蹤

today_operations.reason: daily-runtime-refresh 今日失敗；requirements.txt 缺失或 dependency install 失敗會阻斷每日 runtime 更新。
today_operations.suggested_script: manual workflow fix, then rerun daily-runtime-refresh
today_operations.expected_impact: 恢復 daily runtime refresh，避免 market_runtime / long horizon runtime 逐步過期。
today_operations.ordering_reason: P0 + runtime freshness + multi-module impact + recurring workflow risk

today_operations.reason: data/m7_sandbox/m7_formula_input_audit.json age is 30 days; recommended update cadence is 7 days.
today_operations.expected_impact: 讓 M7 formula input audit 回到可觀察狀態，降低 M7 debug blind spot。
